landing.headline: Universal Restaurant System
landing.subheadline: Offline-first POS for restaurants. Real-time updates, staff workflows, and a clean setup flow.

success.title: Payment confirmed
success.body: Thank you. You will be redirected to login in a few seconds.
success.provisioning: Setting up your restaurant. Please wait...

failure.title: Payment failed
failure.body: We could not confirm the payment. Please try again or contact support.

client.callWaiterConfirm: Call the waiter to your table?
client.noOrder: No active order on this table.
client.orderError: Could not load order. Please try again.

forgotPassword.title: Reset password
forgotPassword.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.successMessage: If an account with that email exists, you will receive a password reset link shortly.
forgotPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Email verification
verifyEmail.successMessage: Your email address has been confirmed. You can now use all features.
verifyEmail.invalidToken: This verification link is invalid or has expired.
verifyEmail.error: Verification failed. Please try again or request a new link.

resetPassword.title: Set new password
resetPassword.subtitle: Choose a new password for your account.
resetPassword.successMessage: Your password has been updated. You can now log in with your new password.
resetPassword.invalidToken: This reset link is invalid or has expired.
resetPassword.error: Something went wrong. Please try again.

staff.resetConfirm: Reset local cart (Dexie) and form state for current table?

loginLogoutReport.title: Login & logout activity
loginLogoutReport.subtitle: Events for users in your restaurant. Dates use UTC days (same as the API).
loginLogoutReport.empty: No events in this date range.
loginLogoutReport.noRestaurant: Restaurant context is missing; sign in again as a manager.
loginLogoutReport.invalidRange: The start date must be on or before the end date.

salesReports.title: Sales & accounting reports
salesReports.subtitle: Closed orders only. Dates are UTC calendar days (inclusive), matching the API.
salesReports.emptySales: No closed orders in this date range.
salesReports.emptyTop: No product lines in this date range.
salesReports.noRestaurant: Restaurant context is missing; sign in again as a manager.
salesReports.invalidRange: The start date must be on or before the end date.
salesReports.exportsHint: UTF-8 CSV with BOM. Uses the same date range as above.

manageStaff.title: Add staff account
manageStaff.subtitle: Create login credentials for an employee. They can use the app immediately; staff accounts do not require email verification.
manageStaff.name: First name
manageStaff.passwordRules: Use at least 8 characters with upper and lower case, a digit, and one of: @$!%*?&
manageStaff.successBody: The new staff member can sign in with the email and password you set.
manageStaff.errorGeneric: Could not create the staff user. Check the details or try again.
